package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutes() string {
    ruleID := "gin_logger_debug_body_logging_on_hot_routes"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Verbose body or payload logging observed on likely high-volume Gin routes."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
